name: basecamp.follower_rules_toggle_probe_mcw
description: Focused proof-freeze primitive for a McWilliams follower-rules checkbox toggle: prove the rules UI path, toggle the first checkbox hotkey from four-pace to two-pace follow distance, save with a guarded case-sensitive prompt, then prove the same-run saved overmap NPC rule metadata changed.

steps.label: wait_for_gameplay_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: McWilliams gameplay is loaded with Katharina Leach visible before follower-rule input.
steps.failure_rule: If the loaded screen does not OCR Katharina Leach, this scenario cannot prove her follower-rule toggle.

steps.label: audit_katharina_follow_distance_before_toggle
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved overmap NPC metadata starts with Katharina Leach as a follower whose two-pace follow-distance rule is off
steps.failure_rule: If the copied fixture does not contain Katharina with rule_follow_distance_2=false, the later toggle would not prove the intended rule boundary.

steps.label: open_interaction_menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: The nearby-creature interaction chooser is open.
expected_screen_text_after_contains: What do you want to do
steps.failure_rule: If the interaction chooser text is absent after pressing C, later talker/dialogue keys are wrong-screen evidence.

steps.label: open_talker_selector
steps.expected_visible_fact: The interaction-menu Talk to hotkey opens the creature talk selector.
abort_if_text_contains: What do you want to do
steps.abort_reason: still on the nearby-creature interaction chooser after the talk-to key
steps.failure_rule: If the interaction chooser is still visible, stop instead of treating later keys as talker-selector proof.

steps.label: confirm_highlighted_talker
steps.expected_visible_fact: Confirming the highlighted Talk to whom row opens Katharina Leach's dialogue response surface.
abort_if_text_contains: What do you want to do
steps.abort_reason: still on a selector screen after confirming the highlighted talker
steps.failure_rule: If the talker selector remains visible, do not treat later dialogue/rules keys as proven.

steps.label: reveal_dialogue_options
steps.expected_visible_fact: The dialogue response list is visible and includes the follower rules response before selecting it.
abort_if_text_contains: What do you want to do
steps.abort_reason: not on the follower dialogue response list before selecting the rules response
steps.failure_rule: Do not press a response hotkey unless the response list visibly contains the rules/work-together option.

steps.label: open_rules_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: Selecting the visible first dialogue response opens the follower rules UI.
abort_if_text_contains: What do you want to do
steps.abort_reason: rules response did not open the follower rules UI
steps.failure_rule: If the rules UI text is absent, this scenario cannot prove rule-toggle behavior.

steps.label: toggle_first_follow_distance_checkbox
steps.expected_visible_fact: The first follower-rules checkbox hotkey toggles Katharina from four-pace to two-pace following in the visible rules UI.
steps.failure_rule: If pressing b on the proven rules UI does not visibly change the follow-distance row to about two paces, do not credit the toggle or saved metadata.

steps.label: exit_rules_window_to_map
steps.expected_visible_fact: Exiting the follower rules UI returns to the gameplay map before requesting save-and-quit.
steps.failure_rule: If dialogue/rules text remains visible, the following save keys are wrong-screen evidence.
steps.abort_reason: not back on the gameplay map after exiting the follower rules UI

steps.label: request_save_after_rule_toggle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the visible follower-rule toggle.
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the rule-toggle save
steps.failure_rule: Do not press uppercase Y unless the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is proven.

steps.label: confirm_rule_toggle_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: The proven case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime and saved-overmap metadata gates can prove same-run writeback.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_rule_toggle_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player mtime advances after confirming the follower-rule toggle save/writeback
steps.failure_rule: If saved-player mtime does not advance after the proven prompt and uppercase Y, saved follower-rule metadata cannot be credited.

steps.label: audit_katharina_follow_distance_after_toggle
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved overmap NPC metadata contains Katharina Leach with rule_follow_distance_2=true after the visible rules-UI toggle and guarded save/writeback
steps.failure_rule: If saved overmap NPC metadata does not show Katharina's rule_follow_distance_2=true, the rule-toggle primitive remains non-green.
